title: Single-species microarrays and comparative transcriptomics.
author: Chain FJ Ilieva D Evans BJ
content:
S-EPMC2533705 PMC2533705 Single-species microarrays and comparative transcriptomics.

Background

Prefabricated expression microarrays are currently available for only a few species but methods have been proposed to extend their application to comparisons between divergent genomes.
